proven.claim: PROVEN: Find Returns Undefined at hashForPrinciple
proven.smt2:

; LINE: 83
; PROVEN: Find Returns Undefined at hashForPrinciple
(declare-const match_found Int)
; Guard: undefined check before access
(assert (not (= match_found 0)))

(check-sat)

violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: guard-narrowing
; LINE: 84
; VIOLATION: Guard Narrowing at hashForPrinciple
(declare-const guard_condition Int)
(declare-const guard_returns Int)
(declare-const code_after_reached Int)
(assert (=> (= guard_condition 1) (= guard_returns 1)))
(assert (=> (= guard_returns 0) (= code_after_reached 1)))
(assert (= guard_condition 0))
(assert (= code_after_reached 1))
(check-sat)
